subject: Quick question about {{hs_lead_company_name}}
htmlContent:
Hi {{hs_lead_first_name}},

I noticed {{hs_lead_company_name}} is using Square for POS — great platform for getting started.

Here's what we're seeing with restaurants like yours:

  • Need for high-level insights (Did we make money? Who's our top performer?)
  • Deep operational detail (Inventory trends, waste tracking, staff performance)
  • Day-to-day simplification (No more jumping between Square, spreadsheets, and other tools)

Most existing solutions force you to choose: simplicity OR depth. We built something that does both.

Would love to grab 15 minutes this week to see if it's a fit. No pressure — just a quick conversation about how you're managing operations today.

Let's chat

Thanks,
{{sender_name}}

{{hs_lead_company_name}} • {{hs_lead_city}}, {{hs_lead_state}}
